mapper.select: SELECT id, config_id, config_key, config_name, config_group, config_value, value_type, is_builtin, change_type, change_note, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM jq_sys_config_history WHERE config_id = #{configId} ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT h.id, h.config_id, h.config_key, h.config_name, h.config_group, h.config_value, h.value_type, h.is_builtin, h.change_type, h.change_note, h.created_by, h.updated_by, h.created_at, h.updated_at FROM jq_sys_config_history h WHERE h.change_type = 'DELETE' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM jq_sys_config c WHERE CONVERT(c.config_key USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = CONVERT(h.config_key USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci ) AND h.id = ( SELECT MAX(latest.id) FROM jq_sys_config_history latest WHERE CONVERT(latest.config_key USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = CONVERT(h.config_key USING utf8mb4) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci AND latest.change_type = 'DELETE' ) ORDER BY h.id DESC LIMIT 100

SELECT id, config_id, config_key, config_name, config_group, config_value, value_type, is_builtin, change_type, change_note, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM jq_sys_config_history WHERE id = #{id} AND change_type = 'DELETE' LIMIT 1
